zh.lifeSummary: 當Janett Semphill於大約1370年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun39歲，母親Margaret Montgomery37歲。她於大約1408年與Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1453年在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林享年84歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janett Semphill于大约1370年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun39岁，母亲Margaret Montgomery37岁。她于大约1408年与Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan在苏格兰薩瑟蘭结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1453年在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林享年84岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Semphill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire): habitational name from Hemphill near Galston (Ayrshire), apparently named from Old English henep ‘hemp’ + hyll ‘hill’. This surname is also common in Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Janett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either an elaborated version of Janet , with the distinctly feminine suffix -ette, or a simplified form of Jeannette .

en.lifeSummary: When Janett Semphill was born about 1370, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun, was 39 and her mother, Margaret Montgomery, was 37. She married Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan about 1408, in Sutherland, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1453, in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 84, and was buried in Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janett Semphill est née environ 1370, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Montgomery, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan environ 1408, à Sutherland, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1453, à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janett Semphill um 1370 in Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun 39 und ihre Mutter Margaret Montgomery 37. Sie hat um 1408 in Sutherland, Scotland Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1453 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janett Semphill è nata il circa 1370 nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Margaret Montgomery, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan circa 1408, nel Sutherland, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1453, nel Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janett Semphillが約1370年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstounは39歳，母Margaret Montgomeryは37歳であった。約1408年にスコットランドススエルランドでSir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1453年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングで84歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janett Semphill(이)가 대략 1370년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Montgomery(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1408년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드에서 Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1453년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janett Semphill nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Montgomery, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan aproximadamente 1408, em Sutherland, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1453, em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janett Semphill родилась около 1370 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Montgomery, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan около 1408 г. в местности сутирланд, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1453 г. в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janett Semphill nació aproximadamente 1370, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Thomas de Sempill II of Eliotstoun, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret Montgomery, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sir John Stewart 1st of Auchingoun, Blackhall and Ardgowan aproximadamente 1408, en Sutherland, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1453, en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultada en Stirlingshire, Scotland.
